HERMES Bolide 31 Bag - Black with Silver Hardware

Product Details:
Brand: Hermes
Model: Bolide 31
Color: Black
Hardware: Palladium / Silver-tone
Dimensions: 31 x 24 x 12 cm
Blind Stamp: Square R

Condition Report:
Excellent pre-owned condition (98% new). The bag is in its pristine, original condition with no refurbishing. Partial original protective films are still intact on the hardware. 

Editor's Notes:
As the historically first Hermes handbag, the Bolide is a true timeless classic. Its iconic bowling bag silhouette delivers a unique, effortless elegance that is incredibly versatile and suits everyone. This is the ultimate 'forever bag'—a long-term investment piece whose demand and value continue to rise significantly in the secondary market. An exceptional find at a great price.
